sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the bottom-right panel now shows:
- Row 1: blue, red, blue
- Row 2: red, center, blue
- Row 3: blue, red, red
This is: b, R, b / R, center, b / b, R, R. This matches the top-left panel pattern!
But the game is still not over (`game_over: false`, `level_completed: false`).
So matching the top-left panel pattern is also not the correct answer.
Let me think about this differently. I've tried matching all three source panels without success. Maybe the goal is not to match any of the source panels.
Let me look at the center pieces again. The bottom-right center piece has "RR" in the center, like the other center pieces. This suggests that the bottom-right panel's pattern is now consistent with the other panels.
But the game is not over. Maybe the goal is to make all four panels have the same pattern. Let me check if the source panels have the same pattern:
- Top-left: b, R, b / R, center, b / b, R, R
- Top-right: b, R, b / R, center, R / b, R, b
- Bottom-left: R, b, b / R, center, R / b, b, R
No, they don't have the same pattern.
Maybe the goal is to make the bottom-right panel have a pattern that is the "sum" or "combination" of the three source panels. Let me think about this.
Looking at the three source panels:
Top-left: b, R, b / R, center, b / b, R, R
Top-right: b, R, b / R, center, R / b, R, b
Bottom-left: R, b, b / R, center, R / b, b, R
The only cell that is the same in all three panels is (1,0) = R and (1,1) = center.
The other cells vary:
(0,0): b, b, R -> 2b, 1R
(0,1): R, R, b -> 2R, 1b
(0,2): b, b, b -> 3b
(1,2): b, R, R -> 1b, 2R
(2,0): b, b, b -> 3b
(2,1): R, R, b -> 2R, 1b
(2,2): R, b, R -> 2R, 1b
If the goal is to take the majority vote:
(0,0): b (2b, 1R)
(0,1): R (2R, 1b)
(0,2): b (3b)
(1,2): R (2R, 1b)
(2,0): b (3b)
(2,1): R (2R, 1b)
(2,2): R (2R, 1b)
Majority: b, R, b / R, center, R / b, R, R
Current: b, R, b / R, center, b / b, R, R
To get majority: need (1,2) b->R
That's 1 click. Let me try this.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current bottom-right: b, R, b / R, center, b / b, R, R (matches top-left)
# Let me try the majority vote pattern: b, R, b / R, center, R / b, R, R
# Need: (1,2) b->R

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 46, 'col': 54}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
